{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/habr-unique-projects/key-findings/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "key-findings"
tags:
  * habr-unique-projects
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. key-findings

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [[01-yodoca|01-yodoca.md]] — 
* [[02-memnet|02-memnet.md]] — 
* [[03-pda-llm-as-periphery|03-pda-llm-as-periphery.md]] — 
* [[04-dochkina-sequential|04-dochkina-sequential.md]] — 
* [[05-supplementary-infrastructure|05-supplementary-infrastructure.md]] — 
* [[06-svyazi-2-0-block-map|06-svyazi-2-0-block-map.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.25)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.19)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.19)
